lessons.title: Adverse Possession Basic Framework
lessons.description: Let me begin with what adverse possession actually does, because students often misstate this. Adverse possession does not positively grant title to a squatter.

lessons.title: Requirements for Adverse Possession
lessons.description: The requirements for adverse possession are well-established in Irish and English case law.

lessons.title: Special Cases and Advanced Issues
lessons.description: Let us begin with future interests and reversions. Where land is subject to a lease, the paper owner holds the freehold reversion — the right to recover possession at the end of the lease.
